mapper.select: SELECT * FROM students WHERE is_deleted = false
SELECT * FROM students WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_courses( student_id, course_name, course_start_at, course_end_at ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{courseName}, #{courseStartAt}, #{courseEndAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE student_courses SET course_name = #{courseName} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE students SET is_deleted = true WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false
UPDATE students SET is_deleted = false WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = true
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students WHERE email = #{email}
